title: 💻 Claude Code Security Best Practices - Backslash
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Claude Code Security Best Practices. Claude Code is a popular agentic coding assistant designed by Anthropic to run in a developer’s terminal, offering deep codebase analysis, code generation, project planning, and automation through natural language prompts. ## **Why Claude Code Security Matters**. When AI becomes part of your coding environment, the IDE is no longer “just a text editor.” It’s an insider with:. * **The ability to run commands**. That’s not just convenience — it’s risk. A single poisoned prompt or misconfigured setting can turn Claude Code from your coding partner into a threat actor. This blog is your guide to staying safe: how to configure Claude Code, what traps to avoid, and how to combine internal and external defenses. Every time it runs a command or reads a file, it’s acting with your permissions. ## **The Heart of Security: `managed-settings.json`**. Like most AI coders, Claude Code has a variety of configuration settings for security. Claude Code’s security settings live here:.

title: 💻 Claude Code Best Practices: Lessons From Real Projects
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

**In this post, I’ll break down my Claude Code setup, when I use BMAD vs plan mode, how I structure CLAUDE.md, and the lessons I learned after shipping three real projects.**. | AI SDLC | [BMAD Method](https://github.com/bmadcode/BMAD-METHOD) for large projects, Claude Code plan mode for smaller features |. | Skills | Security review (built-in), [SEO analysis, Google Analytics, web accessibility](https://github.com/ziniman/ai-instruct), [web design](https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/tree/main/plugins/frontend-design) |. When I built it, I used Claude Code alongside [BMAD](https://github.com/bmadcode/BMAD-METHOD), an [AI SDLC framework](/blog/ai-driven-sdlc/) that guides you through product design, user flows, and specifications before you write a single line of code. Follow the [official guidelines](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/memory#set-up-a-project-claude-md). The next thing on my list is getting serious about the [skill creator](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code/skills) and turning more of my Serverless blog posts into proper Serverless custom skills, using my own published content as the authority of knowledge, so that Claude Code reviews against the same standards I write about publicly.

title: 💻 Best practices and examples for using Claude Code - GitHub
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# awattar/claude-code-best-practices. # 🧠 Claude Code Best Practices. This repo distills best practices, patterns, and examples for integrating Claude Code into your terminal-based coding environment. ## ✨ What is Claude Code? Claude Code is a command-line tool that gives you direct access to Claude’s reasoning and coding capabilities. It’s designed for agentic coding - where Claude autonomously explores, edits, and explains code across your project. Claude Code is optimized for agentic coding - AI that acts with autonomy and awareness:. This repository includes a collection of custom slash commands designed to streamline development workflows with Claude Code. Automatically generates comprehensive CLAUDE.md files for any project by analyzing project structure, technology stack, and development patterns. Provides comprehensive help documentation for all available custom commands, including usage examples and best practices. This repository includes a collection of 10 specialized AI agents that provide domain-specific expertise across all development workflows. These agents work automatically with commands to deliver expert-level capabilities in architecture, development, and quality assurance. ## 📚 Claude Code Documentation.

title: 💻 Claude Code /simplify and /batch Commands Guide
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

Claude Code /simplify runs 3-agent code review on your changes. Claude Code's `/batch` command orchestrates large-scale changes across your codebase in parallel. `/simplify` and `/batch` are bundled Claude Code commands -- they ship with every installation and work out of the box. `/simplify` and `/batch` signal where Claude Code is headed: bundled multi-agent workflows that handle common engineering patterns out of the box. If you want a development framework with pre-built agent orchestration, custom slash commands, and multi-agent patterns that work alongside these bundled commands, the [ClaudeFast Code Kit](/) ships with 18 specialized agents and a pipeline designed for exactly this kind of workflow. [What Claude Code /simplify Does](#what-claude-code-simplify-does)[When to Use /simplify](#when-to-use-simplify)[What /simplify Is Not](#what-simplify-is-not)[What Claude Code /batch Does](#what-claude-code-batch-does)[The Plan Step](#the-plan-step)[Requirements](#requirements)[When to Use /batch](#when-to-use-batch)[/simplify vs /batch: When to Use Each Command](#simplify-vs-batch-when-to-use-each-command)[Practical Workflow Examples](#practical-workflow-examples)[Example 1: Feature Development Cycle](#example-1-feature-development-cycle)[Example 2: Framework Migration](#example-2-framework-migration)[Example 3: API Standardization](#example-3-api-standardization)[Bundled Commands vs Custom Slash Commands](#bundled-commands-vs-custom-slash-commands)[Tips for Using /simplify and /batch Effectively](#tips-for-using-simplify-and-batch-effectively)[FAQ](#faq)[Next Steps](#next-steps).

title: 💻 Show HN: Send Claude Code tasks to the Batch API at 50% off | Hacker News
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Show HN: Send Claude Code tasks to the Batch API at 50% off | Hacker News. Show HN: Send Claude Code tasks to the Batch API at 50% off (github.com/s2-streamstore) 23 points by misker14 months ago | hide | past | favorite | 1 comment Hey HN. I built this because my Anthropic API bills were getting out of hand (spoiler: they remain high even with this, batch is not a magic bullet). So here is a small MCP that lets you send work directly to Anthropic's Batch API from inside Claude Code, for the same quality responses just 50% cheaper, results come back in ~30min-1hr. ``` How it works: you type /batch review this codebase for security issues, Claude gathers all the context, builds a self-contained prompt, ships it to the Batch API via an MCP server, and you get notified in the status bar when it's done (optional).

title: 💻 How I Batch a Full Week of Content in One Day with Claude Code
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

How I Batch a Full Week of Content in One Day with Claude Code
Dee Willis | AI Digital Products
2350 subscribers
8 likes
153 views
7 Apr 2026
► Join the HerMpire Builders Community to download the free Content Batch Day System skill + manual + implementation guide 👉 https://skool.com/digitalmpire-builders
► Tap into your 14-Day Free Skool Trial: https://www.skool.com/signup?ref=070272b1669f463f91939c76d77d798e

If you want to batch a week of content in one day with Claude, this video is your step-by-step. No code required, no tech background needed, and your content will actually sound like you because we're training it on your voice, your offers, and your audience from the jump.

I walk you through how to use the Content Batch Day System skill inside both Claude desktop and Claude Code. You can start from a topic idea, drop in a blog post URL, or upload a video transcript and it will generate Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, carousels, and community posts all in one session.

Whether you're using Claude desktop or running Claude Code off your computer, I show you both paths so you can choose what works for your setup. And everything you need to get started is completely free in the HerMpire Builders community.

What's inside this video:

- How to install the Content Batch Day System skill in Claude desktop
- How to set up the skill inside Claude Code for faster, file-based batching
- How to build your content pack (brand voice, avatar, offers) so your AI output actually sounds like you
- How to use a blog post, YouTube transcript, or topic idea as your content source
- What types of content it produces across every platform

You don't need to set this up every time. You build the content pack once, and from that point on Claude knows who you are and what you create. That's how you go from spending hours on content every week to getting it all done in one sitting.

Get the skill, the manual, and the implementation guide for free in Builders. Link above.

title: 💻 GitHub - s2-streamstore/claude-batch-toolkit: Send non-urgent work to the Anthropic Batch API at 50% cost — directly from Claude Code · GitHub
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

## Use saved searches to filter your results more quickly. # claude-batch-toolkit. Send non-urgent work to the Anthropic Batch API (or Vertex AI) at **50% cost** — directly from Claude Code. Works with the Anthropic API directly or through Google Cloud's Vertex AI. This shows what will be removed, asks for confirmation, and preserves your results in `~/.claude/batches/results/`. If you prefer not to run the install script — or need to install in a restricted environment — follow these steps to set up each component by hand. | **curl** | Polls the Anthropic API from statusline | `brew install curl` or `apt-get install curl` |. #### Step 2: Install the MCP server. #### Step 4 *(optional)*: Install the statusline script. Skip this step if you don't want batch job counts in your Claude Code status bar. #### Step 6: Register the MCP server in `~/.claude.json`. #### Step 7 *(optional)*: Configure the statusline in `~/.claude/settings.json`.
